name: CAS Engineering-DC LLC
description: Engineering and surveying firm with DC registered surveyor David C. Landsman, providing land surveying services in the District of Columbia.

name: Currie and Associates LLC
description: Licensed and registered land surveyor firm offering ALTA surveys, boundary surveys, and services for commercial and governmental projects in the DC Metro Area.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Trusted by architects, contractors, developers and local government agencies for over 35 years
Meet Your Deadlines Without Sacrificing Quality or Reliability
We Help you Build your dreams
adds more value and efficiency than other firms, so your project is a success—every time

sentiment.summary: Currie and Associates is highly regarded as a trusted, experienced civil engineering and surveying firm known for efficiency, accuracy, and delivering quality results for over 35 years.

name: DeMarr Engineering
description: Provides licensed and registered land surveying services including boundary surveys, topographic surveys, DC building plats, construction stakeout, condominium plats, and ALTA/NSPS surveys in Washington DC.

name: District Survey, LLC
address: 800 Maine Ave SW, Suite 200, Washington, DC 20024
description: Land surveying company led by DC registered surveyor Ismael Vazquez, offering surveying services in Washington DC.

name: Duley and Associates, Inc.
description: Provides professional land surveying services including boundary/stake surveys to customers in Washington D.C. and Maryland, emphasizing fast, high-quality products at reasonable prices.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The surveyors were prompt and very professional.

sentiment.summary: Provides professional land surveying services including boundary/stake surveys to customers in Washington D.C. and Maryland, emphasizing fast, high-quality products at reasonable prices.

name: Exacta Land Surveyors LLC
description: Provider of land surveys and field management services for residential and commercial real estate transactions, operating in Washington DC and Northern Virginia.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Excellent service and very prompt filling of order.
Great job accommodating our crazy request for a quick turnaround.
beating the schedule deadline and providing the buyers peace of mind!
I used the service years ago and they still have my information ready at any time. Awesome.

sentiment.summary: Exacta Land Surveyors LLC has an exceptional reputation built on consistently delivering high-quality surveys on time with excellent customer service and professional responsiveness.

name: Potomac Valley Surveys
description: Professional land surveying and site planning firm with over 35 years of experience serving Montgomery County and Washington DC, specializing in boundary surveys and infill plans.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: More than 35 years experience surveying in the Washington Metropolitan area
Works closely with home owners, architects, and builders to ensure site design integrates naturally
Licensed Professional Land Surveyor in Maryland and District of Columbia

sentiment.summary: Potomac Valley Surveys presents a strong professional reputation with extensive experience, proper credentials, and active industry memberships, though these are website claims rather than customer reviews.

name: Sorrell Land Surveying
description: Serving Eastern North Carolina with surveying needs for swampland, farmland, and job sites.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: serving the citizens and communities of Eastern North Carolina
no place we won't go for our clients
wide range of software formats and specialized services

sentiment.summary: Sorrell Land Surveying is presented as an established, experienced surveying firm with comprehensive technical capabilities and strong commitment to serving Eastern North Carolina clients across diverse project types.

name: Vyfhuis & Associates
address: 3112 Rhode Island Avenue, NE, Washington, DC 20018
description: Land surveying firm led by DC registered surveyor Compton G. Vyfhuis, providing professional surveying services in the District of Columbia.
